stemHtml: Refer to figure or CAP 697 figure 4.5.4b. An airplane is descending from FL350 to FL50 with the following descent speeds 0.70 M/280/250 KIAS. Additionally, the aircraft has a landing weight of 42 500 kg and is experiencing a headwind component of 21 knots. Based on this information, choose the correct statement.

options.b: Distance traveled during descent is 92 Nautical Air Miles (NAM)
